falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern relied on volatility compression and orderly decline; a sustained VIX spike above 35 indicates panic selling and capitulation, breaking the pattern's structure and invalidating the 'bottom' analog

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury yield curve steepens by more than 40 basis points from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern occurred with stable/flattening curve dynamics; rapid steepening signals recession acceleration or funding stress, proving the macro regime has shifted away from the pattern's conditions

falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below the lower 3-sigma Bollinger Band (20-day, 2.0) on daily chart and holds there for 3+ consecutive closes
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 78% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug implied contained downside with mean-reversion behavior; sustained closes below the lower band indicate breakdown of the range-bound structure and failure of the pattern

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
